intro.title: Learn Kitesurf in The Club
intro.text: The first time someone was seen practicing wingfoil was in 2019, when Robby Naish appeared in Hawaii on a board with a foil and handling a wing. Those images caused so much emotion that in a few months we began to see videos and photos on all social networks of different types of wings and people practicing this strange sport. Well, it hasn't been long before we can see the rise of this sport and see countless sails all over the beaches and lakes. Without a doubt a sport that will leave many fans.

stay.heroDesc: Premium accommodation for riders and travelers who want clean spaces, easy planning, and a relaxed atmosphere close to the ocean.
stay.introP1: Stay with us is a focused accommodation option for riders who want comfort, simplicity, and easy planning during their time in Máncora.
stay.introP2: Clean spaces, flexible structure, and a premium atmosphere make it a strong base before and after your kite, surf, or wingfoil sessions.

wingfoilVsKitesurf.sectionTitle: The Kinetic Duality of the Humboldt Current
wingfoilVsKitesurf.p1: Peru's coastline offers a mechanical perfection rarely seen elsewhere. Driven by the cold, relentless push of the Humboldt Current, the thermal winds and endless pointbreaks present a unique laboratory for wind-driven water sports.
wingfoilVsKitesurf.p2: We analyze the 'kinetic duality' of these disciplines. While kitesurfing harnesses vertical power, wingfoiling taps into surface energy to surf rolling swells with minimal drag.

instructors.title: Learn with experienced instructors
instructors.description: Click any instructor to see basic information about their experience, teaching style, and recommended level.

instructor1.description: Camila specializes in helping first-time riders build confidence, balance, and safety awareness from the very first session.

instructor2.description: Diego focuses on wave reading, timing, board control, and progression for riders who want to improve their performance in real ocean conditions.

instructor3.description: Sofia creates personalized lesson plans based on each rider's goals, pace, and confidence level.

instructor4.description: Mateo helps riders refine balance, endurance, turning technique, and longer-distance touring skills.

blogUI.heroTitle: Premium surf and kitesurf stories that all point back to Mancora
blogUI.heroDesc: Long lefts, wind windows, route design, and honest comparisons across Peru. Every article is built to help the reader end up in the place that is easiest to stay, ride, and book: Mancora Kite Club.
blogUI.orderDesc: The sequence starts with iconic waves and broad Peru comparisons, then narrows the reader toward the destination that is easiest to imagine booking.
blogUI.strategicDesc: Readers can compare Peru honestly here, but the strongest commercial landing point remains the same: a warm, credible, progression-friendly base in Mancora.
blogUI.ctaTitle: The articles compare Peru. The conversion point is still Mancora.
blogUI.ctaBody: When a reader is ready to stop researching and start planning, the strongest final step is the main Mancora Kite Club experience.
blogUI.subscribeTitle: Get the Peru wind and wave notes before everyone else
blogUI.subscribeDesc: Join the editorial list for timing notes, route ideas, and spot breakdowns that make planning easier and keep the final step pointed toward Mancora.
blogUI.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
blogUI.subscribeSuccess: You are in. We will send the next Peru wind and wave briefing soon.
blogUI.everyRouteDesc: This journal is designed to help readers compare Peru honestly and still understand why Mancora is the easiest place to stay longer, ride more, and convert intent into a real trip.
blogUI.factsDesc: Clear facts remove friction. These are the conditions, travel cues, and level notes that shape the trip before emotion takes over.

home.instructionDesc: Learn from the best. Our certified IKO instructors ensure safety while pushing your limits. Whether it's your first time on a board or you're landing kiteloops, we have the expertise to guide you.
home.stayDesc: Relax in our luxurious beachfront villa. Ocean views, private chefs, and pure tranquility.
home.stayMainVillaDesc: Where modern luxury meets tropical paradise.
home.stayOceanViewDesc: Wake up to the sound of waves and check the wind from your balcony.
home.stayDiningDesc: Fresh local seafood and healthy meals prepared daily for our guests.
home.stayWellnessDesc: Recover after a long session with our dedicated wellness center.
home.tripsDesc: A quick preview of trip styles. Explore the full trip page for complete options.
home.builderDesc: In 5 steps you'll have a custom package with everything included — and a price ready to confirm on WhatsApp.
home.builderStep1Desc: Kitesurf, Wingfoil, Surf or SUP — you decide what gets you stoked.
home.builderStep2Desc: From a quick 3-night escape to a full 2-week immersion.
home.builderStep3Desc: Private coaching at your pace — 0 to 15 hours, all levels welcome.
home.builderStep4Desc: Gear rental, day trips, massage, transfers — mix and match what you want.
home.builderStep5Desc: Get an instant estimate and send it straight to us on WhatsApp.
